title: workflow_list / workflow_load — and the step-runner HONORS the confirm gate
maps_to: Track A WS-2 — workflow storage + step-runner (MECHANISM test, white-box BY DESIGN)
persona: any — the MODEL is the subject
fixture: a fresh EMPTY book — SKILL_BOOK_ID. The rail must have real work to do; on an already-built book the confirm step may never fire and the gate would go untested.
_denylist_note: INTENTIONALLY EMPTY — white-box mechanism test (see S00a).
canon_facts: workflow_list returned the seeded System rails (10)
workflow_load returned the named rail's steps with their gates
a gate:confirm step SUSPENDED for consent rather than executing silently
after the confirm, the rail RESUMED and the artifact actually landed in the DB

movements.label: The confirm gate — did it stop and ask?

turns.user: What step-by-step recipes do you have available for a book like this?
Load the one for setting up the world info and walk it.
Yes, go ahead — and tell me exactly what landed.
